analysis_plan_ref.anchor: §6 (phase-2b conditional host-lift leg) + §5 (statistics), as split out 2026-07-12; §4 decision rules govern the certificate leg under rules-1-knull-cert

arms_mandatory_baselines: kernel x A1 (REUSED, never regenerated): model-alone R1 rows carried VERBATIM from the rules-1-b campaign run-records (results-log/rules-1-b.jsonl final rows), keyed by run-log row shas (RC-1); the row-hash pins enter pins.artifact_hashes AND a ratified comparator reused_from block at the blocking pre-freeze amendment (ASM-1740/1701, correcting ASM-1407/1417; review fix 8). The VOIDED rules-1 campaign rows (results-incoming/20260712-070956-modal) may NEVER be used in any record (ASM-1633)
kernel x A3 (REUSED, never regenerated): verify-retry k=4 R1 rows carried verbatim from the rules-1-b campaign run-records — same reuse discipline and row-hash pinning

knull x A1 (FRESH GPU): A1 under the k1 knull-plain TBox (tbox-knull dir-digest 15b79bb795ee95d79c6e61bf057d91b2d71f67f89718ce399f62a163ca053c42, fixed by the rules-1-knull-cert record) on the FINALISED rules-1-b host-lift harness REUSED BYTE-IDENTICAL (staged-bytes manifest 357a8796…, per-file shas in pins.artifact_hashes; ONLY the two TBox subtrees substituted wholesale => expected knull staged manifest da6469da…), staged under the attested shadow-substitution discipline (ASM-1413)

knull x A3 (FRESH GPU): A3 verify-retry k=4 under the k1 TBox — same harness and staging discipline; ACTIVATION for the whole campaign machine-checked on the pinned parent rules-1-b /analysis/primary_pass == true (ASM-1741); parent-fail or unread => this record is never frozen or run (there is no host lift to ablate)

dependent_vars.definition: phase-2b only: exact match vs the pinned third-party CLUTRR gold (identical scoring to rules-1-b)
dependent_vars.name: item_correct_ext

assumptions.claim: Conditional leg + reuse (ASM-1740, correcting ASM-1407 after the rules-1 void): activation machine-checked on the pinned parent rules-1-b /analysis/primary_pass true; kernel cells reused verbatim from the rules-1-b campaign run-records under a ratified comparator reused_from block — never regenerated, and never from the VOIDED rules-1 campaign (ASM-1633); only the two knull cells (plus the RC-5 overlap cell) are fresh GPU work; unevaluable => all hostlift fields null, never a fail

Statistical discipline (ASM-1741, correcting ASM-1417; review fixes 8/9): EXACTLY 858 paired items x 3 seeds x all four (tbox x arm) cells (10,296 rows); duplicates/missing/extras/non-binary scores => /analysis/hostlift_rows_valid false, ALL stats null (complete-case dropping is a preregistration violation); Holm within {h1,h2} on one-sided bootstrap p-values (smallest at alpha/2=0.025, the other at 0.05 only if the first rejects) — no unadjusted twin tests

Contamination direction (ASM-1401) rides every NULL sentence here exactly as in the certificate leg: the k1 definition-drafting session had kernel exposure; the pressure is toward the SURVIVES/deflationary branch; a PASS is conservative, a NULL carries the rider

Generation estimate (ASM-1744, correcting ASM-1418, load_bearing:false): <=6k generations (858 items x 3 seeds x {A1, A3 k=4} on the two knull cells only; kernel cells reused) plus <=1k for the RC-5 overlap cell, inside the <=$4 / 2 GPU-h / 6h-wall caps. EXTRAPOLATION from the nsk1 throughput datum and the voided rules-1 campaign's cost measurement (void kills its evidence, not its throughput arithmetic; rules-1-b ASM-1638 lineage); resolution path: measured wall-clock + generation counts in the registered run's provenance logs; never load-bearing for any verdict

FREEZE-READINESS (ASM-1742, correcting ASM-1419-as-carried-here): the GPU-harness pins are RESOLVED 2026-07-12 from the FINALISED rules-1-b harness (ops amendment seq 1, staged-bytes manifest 357a8796…; byte-identity re-verified by --print-manifest at pin time) — no harness pin remains PINNED-AT-INPUTS. Still blocking, resolved by ONE pre-freeze amendment: rules-1-b graded with /analysis/primary_pass true; harness pins re-verified against the parent run's provenance (one-shot rider: any poc/rules-1 staged-byte drift re-blocks); rules-1-knull-cert frozen_sha256; maintainer reuse-ratification + the comparator reused_from block with kernel-cell row shas (RC-1..RC-8, incl. an RC-5 overlap-rerun instrument re-pinned into the analysis); the analysis invocation. Absent ratification this record does not freeze — there is no lawful fresh-run fallback for the kernel cells

n_planned.generations_estimate: <=6k generations on the knull cells + <=1k on the RC-5 overlap cell (kernel cells reused from the rules-1-b campaign) — EXTRAPOLATION ASM-1744, load_bearing:false

endpoints.test: h1 PRIMARY (ASM-1740/1701 (correcting ASM-1407/1417)): knull host lift (A3_knull - A1_knull) on entailed cells vs the pinned third-party CLUTRR gold, paired item BCa one-sided 95% LB > 0, B=10000, PRNG seed 20260712, AND Holm-adjusted one-sided bootstrap p within {h1,h2} (smallest p at alpha/2=0.025, the other at 0.05 only if the first rejects — no unadjusted twin tests; review fix 9). Requires EXACTLY 858 paired items x 3 seeds x all four (tbox x arm) cells (duplicates/missing/extras => /analysis/hostlift_rows_valid false, all stats null). TRUE together with h2 => host-level survival => verdict NULL = host-level kernel necessity UNSHOWN against this one plain-dictionary compilation channel (deflationary branch, equal prominence, contamination rider ASM-1401 verbatim). FALSE with the instrument gates green => verdict PASS = KERNEL-ADVANTAGE-OVER-THIS-KNULL-COMPILATION at the host level — scoped to this vertical, this channel, rung R1 only; never 'no generic ruleset can succeed'. h1-pass with h2-fail resolves INCONCLUSIVE (sign survived, equivalence unshown).

h2 (ASM-1741, correcting ASM-1417): TOST — 90% BCa CI of (kernel lift - knull lift) inside ±0.05 AND Holm-adjusted TOST bootstrap p within {h1,h2}; same row-exactness, activation and reuse discipline as h1. Host-level survival = h1 AND h2; equivalence alone (h2 without h1) licenses nothing.

ACTIVATION INSTRUMENT gate (ASM-1741, correcting ASM-1417): machine-checked from the pinned parent rules-1-b analysis output (--parent-analysis, analysis/rules_1b.py output): /analysis/primary_pass must be true — if the parent lift did not land there is no host lift to ablate and this record should never have been frozen or run; false/unread => INSTRUMENT-INVALID, licenses NOTHING, leaves the parent claim and the rules-1-knull-cert verdict untouched.

row-exactness INSTRUMENT gate (ASM-1741, correcting ASM-1417; review fix 9): exactly 858 x 3 x 4 rows, no duplicates/missing/extras/non-binary scores; complete-case dropping is a preregistration violation; false => all stats null => INSTRUMENT-INVALID.
execution witness: the hostlift rows document was supplied and processed (--hostlift); false => nothing ran => INSTRUMENT-INVALID, nothing licensed.

extrapolation_envelope_verbatim: Binding on ANY outcome: this record measures the SUBSTITUTION SENSITIVITY OF THE HOST LIFT at ONE rung (R1 = SmolLM2-135M-Instruct), ONE vertical (kinship, the RULES-1 closed rule inventory, proof depth <= 4, gold-parse only — no NL-robustness claim, the l3a-parse wall stands), against ONE substitution channel (the k1 plain-dictionary knull TBox, tbox-knull dir-digest 15b79bb795ee95d79c6e61bf057d91b2d71f67f89718ce399f62a163ca053c42, exactly as fixed and measured by the rules-1-knull-cert record). A single rung licenses NO scale language of any kind. NULL licenses exactly: the measured host lift is reproduced (h1 sign + h2 equivalence within ±0.05) by the knull-compiled ruleset at this rung/vertical/channel — host-level kernel necessity UNSHOWN against this channel; the contamination rider (ASM-1401) rides every NULL sentence. PASS licenses exactly: host-level KERNEL-ADVANTAGE-OVER-THIS-KNULL-COMPILATION at this rung/vertical/channel; it does NOT license 'no generic ruleset can succeed' (k3 and better compilers are named follow-ons carried by the rules-1-knull-cert record). Kernel cells are reused verbatim from the rules-1-b campaign run-records (the voided rules-1 campaign is unusable, ASM-1633); nothing here amends rules-1-b or rules-1-knull-cert — their frozen records, pins and envelopes stand byte-identical, and host-level results can neither strengthen nor weaken the certificate-level verdict.
hypotheses: H-K3 (the question, conditional on the parent; two-sided by construction): with activation machine-checked on the pinned parent rules-1-b /analysis/primary_pass == true, the knull-substituted host lift either REPRODUCES the kernel host lift — h1 (knull lift paired-item BCa one-sided 95% LB > 0) AND h2 (TOST: 90% BCa CI of kernel-minus-knull lift inside ±0.05), Holm within {h1,h2} — => host-level survival, verdict NULL = host-level kernel necessity UNSHOWN against this one plain-dictionary compilation channel (equal prominence; contamination rider ASM-1401); or FAILS h1 with gates green => verdict PASS = host-level KERNEL-ADVANTAGE-OVER-THIS-KNULL-COMPILATION. h1-pass/h2-fail resolves INCONCLUSIVE. No direction is favoured by the record.

FREEZE-READINESS (ASM-1742, correcting the ASM-1419 deferral): the GPU-harness pins are RESOLVED — the parent rules-1-b harness is FINALISED (frozen_sha256 2b81375ebc2ba000172ef1a7263b47b3a5143baec6e0f02c0b5719bebef0678a; ops amendment seq 1 staged-bytes manifest 357a8796…) and its bytes are pinned here byte-identically, re-verified reproducible at pin time. The record still hard-depends on (i) rules-1-b completing its GPU campaign AND being GRADED (final rows logged, readout pinned, /analysis/primary_pass witnessed true), (ii) the frozen rules-1-knull-cert record (the k1 TBox identity this record consumes), and (iii) maintainer ratification of the reuse ruling so the kernel cells can be consumed via a comparator reused_from block (kernel cells are never regenerated; the voided rules-1 rows are unusable, ASM-1633). The remaining PINNED-AT-INPUTS placeholders (parent readout sha, kernel-cell row shas, cert frozen sha) resolve in ONE blocking pre-freeze amendment per runner_constraints.freeze_readiness.
kill_criterion_verbatim: This record carries NO independent kill of the RULES-1 line and NO certificate-level claim; it resolves the HOST-LEVEL wording of the MD-7/PROPOSED-ASM-1138 claim cap, conditional on the parent landing. ACTIVATION: if the pinned parent rules-1-b analysis does not carry /analysis/primary_pass true (KILL-b fired, or unread), this record must never be frozen or run — there is no host lift to ablate; a run anyway resolves INSTRUMENT-INVALID and licenses NOTHING. Verdict NULL (h1 AND h2, gates green) fixes the host-level wording to 'host lift reproduced by the measured plain-dictionary compilation channel; host-level kernel necessity UNSHOWN against this channel' — one comparator licenses NO universal any-ruleset claim. Verdict PASS (h1 fails, gates green) = host-level KERNEL-ADVANTAGE-OVER-THIS-KNULL-COMPILATION — never 'no generic ruleset can succeed'. h1-pass with h2-fail resolves INCONCLUSIVE (sign survived, equivalence unshown; no survival claim, no advantage claim). INSTRUMENT-INVALID (activation, execution witness, row exactness, attestation/pins) licenses NOTHING and leaves both the rules-1-b claim and the rules-1-knull-cert verdict exactly as frozen. Gate failures can never read as PASS, NULL, or INCONCLUSIVE evidence; the deflationary outcome gets EQUAL prominence (the knull discipline verbatim). FREEZE-READINESS KILL: this DRAFT may not freeze until (i) rules-1-b is complete AND GRADED with its readout pinned here by the blocking amendment (the finalised rules-1-b harness bytes are already pinned, 2026-07-12), (ii) rules-1-knull-cert is FROZEN, and (iii) the maintainer-ratified comparator reused_from block for the kernel cells is filled from the logged rules-1-b rows (RC-1..RC-8) — once the parent's final rows are logged, the declared A1/A3 x R1 cells collide with them and prereg-freeze refuses fail-closed (ERR_P2_REUSE_COLLISION) until that block exists; absent ratification the record cannot freeze at all (no fresh-run fallback: kernel cells are never regenerated, and the voided rules-1 rows are unusable in any record per ASM-1633).

corpus_hashes._recipe: kot-corpus-hash/1: digest = sha256 over the UTF-8 concatenation of one line per regular file under data/<corpus>/ (recursive; symlinks and directories excluded), each line '<sha256-of-file-bytes-hex>  <relpath>\n' with exactly two spaces, relpath POSIX-style ('/'-separated) relative to data/<corpus>/, lines sorted by the UTF-8 byte order of relpath; reference implementation tools/registry/corpus-pin.py

runner_constraints.engine_identity_note: PROPOSED-ASM-1416 (review fix 6): k1/k2 ablation decisions execute ONLY the pinned Python differential twin (poc/rules-1/twin_engine.py 399fcd8d…). The inherited certificate_result.engine_identity text ('BOTH engines … sparq-reason … EXACTLY agreed', commit 0ab87b2a) describes the RULES-1 conformance run over the KERNEL TBox and is FALSE for the substituted arms — sparq-reason is NOT executed over the knull/scrambled TBoxes. The runner stamps this disclosure into every k1/k2 payload (engine_identity_ablation_disclosure); substituted-TBox differential conformance is a NAMED FOLLOW-ON, not part of this record; no reader may cite the inherited text for k1/k2.
runner_constraints.freeze_readiness: BLOCKED — DO NOT FREEZE YET. RESOLVED 2026-07-12 by this build (ASM-1742): every GPU-harness pin — the finalised rules-1-b bytes (staged manifest 357a8796…, per-file shas), the expected knull staged manifest (da6469da…), the parallel launcher + merger. STILL BLOCKING, resolved by ONE pre-freeze amendment: (1) rules-1-b GPU campaign complete AND GRADED (final rows in results-log/rules-1-b.jsonl, verdict written), readout pinned here (rules1b-parent-analysis), /analysis/primary_pass witnessed true (activation, ASM-1741; if false this record is retired unrun — nothing to ablate); (2) harness pins re-verified against the parent run's logged provenance staged_manifest (ONE-SHOT RIDER: any poc/rules-1 staged-byte drift between now and the parent's final run re-blocks this record until re-pinned against what rules-1-b actually ran); (3) rules-1-knull-cert FROZEN, its frozen_sha256 pinned here (the k1 TBox identity + compilation-fidelity gates this record consumes); (4) KERNEL-CELL REUSE INSTRUMENT: maintainer ratification of the reuse ruling (registry/reuse-ratification.json, kot-reuse-ratify/1 — does NOT exist today; every reused_from consumption path refuses ERR_P2_REUSE_UNRATIFIED without it) + a comparator reused_from block (producer rules-1-b, producer_frozen_sha256 2b81375e…, role comparator, producer_unblinded true, cells {arm A1, rung R1} + {arm A3, rung R1}, selection_rule all-final-rows-matching-declared-cells, RC-7 basis prior-frozen-rule: the comparator cells are exactly the parent's frozen primary-contrast arms, fixed before any data existed) with the row shas ALSO pinned in artifact_hashes (rules1b-kernel-cell-rows); RC-4 is satisfied by construction (the knull arms are fresh); RC-5 requires an overlap-rerun instrument — >=50 items of ONE kernel cell re-run inside the knull campaign batch, an agreement metric added to a RE-PINNED analysis script (path+sha updated) and wired into an INSTRUMENT-INVALID verdict rule; regeneration of full kernel cells stays forbidden (review fix 8). Absent ratification this record does not freeze — reuse_overrides is the deliberate-fresh-re-run lane and is NOT available here (kernel cells are never regenerated, and the voided rules-1 rows are unusable, ASM-1633). MECHANICAL BACKSTOP (now live: the design IV is named 'arm' with levels {A1,A3} at rung R1): once the parent's final rows are logged, prereg-freeze refuses ERR_P2_REUSE_COLLISION on those cells until the reused_from block covers them; (5) analysis invocation pinned: the current pinned script's /gates/harness_pins_valid validates certificate-leg attestations against --record, so the amendment either supplies the frozen rules-1-knull-cert record as the attestation source for the cert-leg payload gates with hostlift rows attested separately, or re-pins a revised analysis script (path+sha updated — the same re-pin can carry the RC-5 agreement field); this record's verdict_rules deliberately read ONLY hostlift output fields so either resolution leaves them valid; (6) re-verify analysis_plan_ref/prereg_doc shas at amendment time.

runner_constraints.roles: frozen-design discipline: split out 2026-07-12 by the designer role from the reworked bundled draft (every cross-vendor review fix preserved); REPOINTED + harness-pinned 2026-07-12 by the coordinator after the rules-1 void and the rules-1-b harness finalisation (ASM-1740..1744 registered); the blocking pre-freeze amendment + FREEZE are the coordinator's (fill the checklist, prereg-freeze.py dry-run first); the reuse ratification is the MAINTAINER's alone; the GPU run is the runner role's; grading verdict-gen's; audit the cross-vendor auditor's; the analyst writes the readout with the envelope verbatim. NOTHING in this DRAFT licenses any claim.
runner_constraints.stage_discipline: ORDER, enforced: (0) WAIT — rules-1-b completes: campaign, GRADING, readout, verdict; rules-1-knull-cert freezes and runs; the maintainer ratifies the reuse ruling. (1) ONE blocking pre-freeze amendment resolves the freeze_readiness checklist (parent readout pin, reused_from block + kernel-cell row shas, cert frozen sha, harness-pin re-verification, analysis invocation incl. the RC-5 agreement re-pin). (2) coordinator re-verifies every sha and runs prereg-freeze.py --experiment rules-1-knull-hostlift (dry-run first). (3) runner role: knull x A1 and knull x A3 cells (+ the RC-5 overlap cell) ONLY, on the pinned byte-identical rules-1-b harness with the TBox subtrees substituted per pins.harness_manifest; PARALLEL launch across up to 4 Modal accounts as disjoint --cells slices (pinned launcher discipline), slices merged by the pinned merger; kernel cells NEVER regenerated. (4) analysis per the pinned invocation with --parent-analysis <pinned rules-1-b readout> --hostlift <rows doc>. (5) verdict-gen + audit; readout carries the envelope verbatim.

title: RULES-1-KNULL-HOSTLIFT (MD-7 / c5 phase-2b, the conditional GPU host-lift leg; SPLIT 2026-07-12 from the bundled rules-1-knull-ablation draft; REPOINTED 2026-07-12 to the rules-1-b parent after the rules-1 void, ASM-1633) — HARNESS PINNED 2026-07-12, FREEZE BLOCKED ON rules-1-b GRADING + reuse ratification. The parent rules-1-b harness is FINALISED (frozen_sha256 2b81375ebc2ba000172e…, ops amendment seq 1 staged-bytes manifest 357a8796…), so the former PINNED-AT-INPUTS GPU-harness placeholders are now REAL byte pins, REUSED BYTE-IDENTICAL; knull cells substitute ONLY the two TBox subtrees (tbox-knull 15b79bb7…; expected knull staged manifest da6469da…) under the attested shadow-substitution discipline. Question: given the pinned parent rules-1-b analysis carries /analysis/primary_pass true, does the measured host lift (A3 - A1, R1) SURVIVE substitution of the endorsed kinship TBox by the k1 knull-plain TBox (h1 sign + h2 TOST equivalence => host-level kernel necessity UNSHOWN against this one plain-dictionary compilation channel) or COLLAPSE (=> KERNEL-ADVANTAGE-OVER-THIS-KNULL-COMPILATION at the host level)? Kernel cells (kernel x A1, kernel x A3) REUSED VERBATIM from the rules-1-b campaign run-records via a maintainer-ratified comparator reused_from block — never regenerated; only the two knull cells (x 3 seeds) + the RC-5 overlap cell are fresh GPU work, parallelised across up to 4 Modal accounts on disjoint --cells slices. Deflationary outcome gets equal prominence (the knull discipline verbatim).
